item.name: Ligaka Pirarucu
item.description:
A species of pirarucu identified by its distinctive coloration─akin to countless flowers adrift on the currents.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: When shoals of this colorful fish converge, they almost look like petals of a mysterious flower, blooming majestically underwater. It is said that many have been sent to a watery grave trying to lay their hands on the apparition.
